title: SKT's Troll Lichen
description: Replace Glow Lichen texture with Diamond Ore to trolling your friends
body: ![TL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b21f88ed6a119d5f4ee126aa37d144a0ac30e71b.jpeg) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 📖⠄Description simple resource pack that replace Glow Lichen texture with Diamond Ore to trolling your friends ### ⚠️⠄Important make sure this resource pack is above other resource packs and installed by all player ### 🖼️⠄Ingame Screenshot ### ![SS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da3d99e2f8557dc8a0ed89425ac21a9e6aaa21d2.jpeg) ### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp) ### 👋🏼⠄Follow Me
